stories.title: The Golden Eagle's Quiet Nest
stories.summary: A young golden eagle returns to a warm nest above a peaceful valley.
paragraphs: 🦅 High above a wide valley, a young golden eagle finished his last slow flight of the day.
🏔️ He had looked over the hills.
🌲 He had watched the trees grow darker.
🌙 He had seen the little river become silver in the moonlight.
🪹 Now it was time to return to his nest.
🕊️ The eagle did not need to fly fast anymore.
🪶 He landed softly near his nest.
🏔️ Even the faraway mountains looked ready to rest.
🦅 The eagle tucked one foot under his warm feathers.
👀 Tomorrow there would be new things to see.
🌬️ The eagle took one slow breath in.
💤 Then he slept high above the peaceful valley.

stories.title: The Last Inning at Moonlight Field
stories.summary: A moonlit baseball field winds down after one last calm inning.
paragraphs: ⚾ At Moonlight Field, the baseball game was almost over.
🏃 The players had played their best.
👏 They had cheered for each other.
🌙 Now the scoreboard showed the final inning.
😌 The pitcher took one calm breath.
🤝 The catcher gave a quiet signal.
👀 The batter stood still and watched the ball.
⚾ The ball was hit softly into the outfield.
💡 The coach turned off the bright field lights.
🪵 The bats rested in the dugout.
🧤 The gloves rested on the bench.
⚾ The baseballs rested in their bucket.
🌤️ Tomorrow there could be another game.
😴 But tonight, every player went home to rest.

stories.title: The Little Beaver's Cozy Dam
stories.summary: A little beaver finishes the day beside a calm pond and rests at home.
paragraphs: 🦫 A little beaver had worked all day near a quiet pond.
💧 He had paddled through the water.
🏠 He had checked that his cozy home was safe.
🌅 Now the sun was going down.
🦫 The little beaver looked at the pond.
🦫 The little beaver said, “My work is finished for today.”
🏠 He swam slowly to his home.
👂 He listened to the soft water outside.
🌙 The pond did not need him to work tonight.
😴 But tonight, the little beaver rested in his cozy home.
🌙 And the little beaver dreamed about a calm pond under the moon.

stories.title: The Sleepy Little Rocket
stories.summary: A little rocket slows its engines and drifts quietly beside the stars.
paragraphs: 🚀 A little rocket had traveled all day through space.
🌙 He had waved to the Moon.
✨ He had seen tiny stars far away.
🌌 Now it was nighttime in space.
🚀 The little rocket said, “My engines have worked hard. It is time to rest.”
🔽 He turned his engines down low.
🌍 The rocket floated gently beside a quiet blue planet.
✨ The stars were not in a hurry.
🌙 The Moon was not in a hurry.
🚀 Even the little rocket did not need to go anywhere right now.
🛏️ He put on his soft space blanket.
🪟 He closed one little rocket window.
🚀 He whispered, “Tomorrow I can explore again.”
😴 But tonight, the little rocket floated quietly.
🌌 And he drifted through the soft, quiet stars.
